content: A curiosity-driven autonomous agent equipped with intrinsic curiosity modules (ICM) can be reframed as a self-improving Numerical Planning Operator Learner, where the agent's intrinsic reward for encountering uncertain state transitions doubles as a training signal for refining numerical planning operators. This design creates a closed-loop system where the agent’s natural drive to explore uncovers edge cases in numerical planning that static training datasets would never capture.
